title: The Aurelius Sovereign Duffle
description: Engineered from hand-selected 2.4mm double-shouldered bullhide, dyed with walnut tannins and reinforced with solid sand-cast brass hardware. Built for the modern voyage.

title: The Consul Portfolio Briefcase
description: Double-gusset executive portfolio briefcase, meticulously lined with luxurious pigskin suede and features solid brass dual-combination locks. Individually numbered.

title: The Aurelia Sovereign Handbag
description: Our pinnacle architectural piece. Crafted with a reinforced box frame, natural linen stitching, hand-burnished oil edges, and lined in emerald heavy-grain lambskin.
